profile.name: PURUSHOTTAM SINHA
profile.tagline: Senior Software Engineer | Passionate about Scalable Systems and Developer Productivity

experiences.description: Extended Confluent Managed Flink's Docker build system for s390x (IBM Z) architecture support and built a custom filter/search/field-projection query layer for a Spring Boot Flink management API.
Developed a scalable Spring Boot-based Approval Service in QuickBooks, handling 300K+ workflows/month across 5 entities and built a low-code API connector for REST/GraphQL integration.
Built a reliable CI/CD pipeline for Camunda template deployment using GitOps and Jenkins and implemented Spring Batch jobs to clean up obsolete workflow definitions.
Optimized Workflow Hub UI using lazy loading, image optimization, and parallel API calls, reducing TP99 latency from 5.7s to 3s through performance bottleneck analysis.
Built and containerized a React + Flask ML-powered Eclipse Che plugin, deploying it via internal registry with YAML-based configuration.

experiences.role: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
experiences.description: Graduated with a CGPA of 8.63. Minor in Management.
